name: Silken Tofu Whipped Topping
recipeIngredient: 2 to 4 tablespoons sweetener of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a blender or food processor and blend until very smooth.
2. Add more soymilk, one teaspoon at a time, if the mixture is too thick; continue blending well.
3. Transfer to a covered container and refrigerate until chilled.
Makes 1 3/4 cups
